Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, max(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__max" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/22be36302b1b01a673c36509b97252ca6cd73737b83ffb0e7a8c476ef3a0d59e/1c331d47-9eaa-410a-83c3-cfe264630c52/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
